title: Pack of 96 Measuring Tapes 3M x 15mm – Durable Bulk Wholesale Tape Measures for Professional, DIY, and Retail Use
features: Bulk Value Pack: Includes 96 high-quality measuring tapes, perfect for professionals, DIY enthusiasts, and retailers looking for a cost-effective solution.
Durable & Reliable: Each tape features a robust 3-meter length, 18mm wide blade, and sturdy casing designed for long-lasting use in tough environments.
Accurate Measurements: Clear metric and imperial markings ensure precise and easy-to-read measurements for any project.

description: Pack of 96 Measuring Tapes 3M x 15mm – Wholesale Bulk Pack for Professional and DIY Use Product Description: Equip your toolbox or business with this Pack of 96 Measuring Tapes featuring a robust 3-meter length and 18mm wide tape. Perfect for builders, contractors, DIY enthusiasts, and retailers , this wholesale bulk pack is a reliable and cost-effective solution. Each tape is crafted with precision and durability in mind, ensuring accurate measurements and long-lasting performance. Key Features: Generous Length: Each measuring tape extends up to 3 meters, providing ample length for both small and large projects. Wide Tape for Clarity: The 18mm wide blade features clear, easy-to-read metric and imperial markings, making measurements effortless and accurate. Durable Design: Built with a sturdy casing to withstand tough job site conditions and frequent use. Smooth Retraction: Spring-loaded mechanism ensures smooth and controlled tape retraction, preventing tangles and ensuring safety. Compact & Portable: Ergonomically designed to fit comfortably in your hand and easy to store in pockets or tool belts. Belt Clip & Wrist Strap: Convenient belt clip and wrist strap included for easy access and portability during work. Who It’s For: Ideal for professionals such as carpenters, surveyors, and construction workers . Retailers can benefit from the bulk wholesale pack to stock up inventory or resell individually. It's also perfect for schools, workshops, or DIY enthusiasts who want affordable and reliable measuring tools. Why Choose This Bulk Pack? Wholesale Value: Get 96 high-quality measuring tapes in one bulk purchase, saving you time and money. Great for Resale: Individually packaged, making it convenient to sell or distribute. Multipurpose Use: Suitable for construction, tailoring, crafting, and other projects requiring accurate measurements. Specifications: Quantity: 96 Tape Length: 3M Tape Width: 18mm Units: Metric and Imperial Markings Material: Durable steel blade with plastic casing Keywords: Wholesale measuring tapes, 3m x 15mm measuring tape, bulk measuring tapes, professional tape measures, construction tools, DIY tools, builder tools, metric and imperial tape, wholesale bulk pack, durable measuring tapes. Stock up today on this bulk pack of 96 measuring tapes and ensure you’re always prepared for precise measurements.
